headline: PG&E Sets Dates for Quarterly Stock Dividends
summary: On May 21, 2026, PG&E Corporation (NYSE: PCG) declared its second quarter 2026 regular cash dividend of $0.05 per share on the Corporation's common stock. The dividend is payable on July 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of June 30, 2026.
